title: ZoneState
description: Represents the live state of a specific stadium zone, including current occupancy and density forecasts.

zone_id.description: Unique identifier for the stadium zone (e.g., 'zone_a', 'gate_3_concourse').

zone_name.description: Human-readable name of the zone (e.g., 'North Concourse Gate 3').

current_count.description: Current number of people detected in the zone.

capacity.description: Maximum safe crowd capacity for this zone.

forecast_count_15min.description: Forecasted crowd count in the zone in 15 minutes.

forecast_count_30min.description: Forecasted crowd count in the zone in 30 minutes.

status.description: Safety status of the zone based on density and forecasts.

connected_gates.description: List of gate identifiers connected directly to this zone.

accessible_routes.description: List of routes/paths originating from or passing through this zone.
